answer:
Because there are multiple, distinct services using the name Sherlock, pricing and API availability depend on which tool you are using:

Bill Sherlock offers a free, unauthenticated REST API for medical billing analysis at the endpoint POST https://www.billsherlock.app/api/v1/investigate, limited to 10 requests per hour [1].

Emailsherlock provides an API for email verification with a free tier of 1,000 verifications per month [2].

Sherlocks.ai, an AI-powered SRE platform, includes a self-serve free plan with 30 investigations per month and no credit card required [3][4].

Sherlock Calls, a Slack-native AI voice investigator, offers a free tier providing 100 credits per Slack workspace to start [5][6].

Ansys Sherlock provides gRPC-based APIs for engineering analysis, which require a project to exist within the desktop client to operate [7].

Sherlock AI, a hiring platform, does not offer a free tier, with paid plans starting at $100 per month [8].

Pricing — Sherlock Calls | Free to Start, Scale as You Grow | Sherlock Calls
